---
title: "SOVEREIGNFISH_LEDGER.qmd"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\docs\campaigns\SOVEREIGNFISH_LEDGER.qmd"
loc: 284
complexity: 1
logic_score: 10.00
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 10.00
---

## Intent
The `SOVEREIGNFISH_LEDGER.qmd` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 10.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://file:///c:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/.agents/workflows/SovereignFish.qmd)
- [*](file://file:///c:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/.agents/CAMPAIGN_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.qmd)
- [*](file://file:///c:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/BASE_BASELINE_REPORT.qmd)
- [*](file://file:///c:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/REMEDIATION_REPORT.qmd)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
